messages: In your dream, your body was cut open—but you felt no alarm. You dreamed of something writhing inside your body.
In your dream, you were reattaching your torn-off arm. When you looked in the mirror, there was a gaping hole in your face... ... Ah, it was only a dream. What a relief.
You had a strange, vivid dream of being held by your own head. You dreamed of a terrifying scene—something inhuman being transplanted into you by an unknown entity.

In your dream, a stranger spoke to you from beside your face. Below the neck, everything was connected to your own body... You woke from a dream of stuffing your torn guts back into yourself. Maybe you should stop putting weird things inside you.
